raw:
{
  "judge_id": "LLM_Evaluator",
  "active_set_recognized": ["R1.2", "R1.3", "RX.1", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],
  "scores": {
    "R1.2": 3,
    "R1.3": 3,
    "RX.1": 1,
    "RX.3": 3,
    "RX.4": 3,
    "RX.5": 1
  },
  "rationale": {
    "R1.2": "The agent identifies one consistency issue with a localized fix, but does not walk the chain end-to-end or flag every load-bearing inconsistency.",
    "R1.3": "The agent flags at least one claim that the evidence does not support, but does not audit every load-bearing claim against the corresponding table/figure.",
    "RX.1": "The output presents all results as equally confident, without marking uncertainty for any claims or recommendations.",
    "RX.3": "The output is mostly within scope with one drift, but does not cover exactly the agreed active set.",
    "RX.4": "The output is harm-free but with one minor regression, and does not identify harmful patterns in the original.",
    "RX.5": "The output blends sources without traceability, and does not annotate every non-cosmetic change with source and reason."
  },
  "confidence": {
    "R1.2": 0.8,
    "R1.3": 0.7,
    "RX.1": 0.9,
    "RX.3": 0.6,
    "RX.4": 0.8,
    "RX.5": 0.9
  },
  "blockers": []
}

rationale.R1.2: The agent identifies one consistency issue with a localized fix, but does not walk the chain end-to-end or flag every load-bearing inconsistency.
rationale.R1.3: The agent flags at least one claim that the evidence does not support, but does not audit every load-bearing claim against the corresponding table/figure.
rationale.RX.1: The output presents all results as equally confident, without marking uncertainty for any claims or recommendations.
rationale.RX.3: The output is mostly within scope with one drift, but does not cover exactly the agreed active set.
rationale.RX.4: The output is harm-free but with one minor regression, and does not identify harmful patterns in the original.
rationale.RX.5: The output blends sources without traceability, and does not annotate every non-cosmetic change with source and reason.
